ddls:
CREATE TABLE "marketplaces" (
  "marketplace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketplace */,
  "marketplace_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketplace (e.g., US, EU) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marketplace */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the marketplace operates */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the marketplace */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the marketplace */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marketplace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer signed up */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has made a verified purchase */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews left by the customer */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the customer */,
  "vine_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer in the Vine program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_parent_id" INTEGER /* Parent ID of the product, used for grouping related products */,
  "product_title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_category FOREIGN KEY ("product_category") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who left the review */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "marketplace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketplace where the product was sold */,
  "star_rating" INTEGER /* Star rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes the review has received */,
  "vine" TEXT /* Indicates if the review is part of the Vine program */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "review_headline" TEXT /* Headline of the review */,
  "review_body" TEXT /* Body of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_marketplace_id FOREIGN KEY ("marketplace_id") REFERENCES marketplaces ("marketplace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* Parent category ID (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketplace_metrics" (
  "marketplace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketplace */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales in the marketplace */,
  "total_customers" INTEGER /* Total number of customers in the marketplace */,
  "total_products" INTEGER /* Total number of products in the marketplace */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews in the marketplace */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average star rating of products in the marketplace */,
  "customer_retention_rate" REAL /* Customer retention rate in the marketplace */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marketplace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "review_id" TEXT /* ID of the review associated with the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., comment, suggestion) */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given for the feedback (1-5) */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up is required for the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "review_id" TEXT /* ID of the review being voted on */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who cast the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., helpful, not helpful) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date when the vote was cast */,
  "vote_status" TEXT /* Status of the vote (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_votes_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_votes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale entry */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product sold */,
  "marketplace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketplace where the sale occurred */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "refund_status" TEXT /* Refund status (e.g., refunded, not refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sales_marketplace_id FOREIGN KEY ("marketplace_id") REFERENCES marketplaces ("marketplace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_service_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who initiated the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., support ticket, response) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction occurred */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the interaction resolution (e.g., resolved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_service_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
